km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Richard Monington於大約1246年出生在英國英格蘭。他和Elizabeth至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Monington于大约1246年出生在英国英格兰。他和Elizabeth至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Monington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Monnington
meanings: English: locative name from Monnington on Wye or Monnington Straddle in Vowchurch (both Herefs).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Monington was born about 1246, in England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 daughter with Elizabeth.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Monington est né environ 1246, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Elizabeth.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Monington wurde um 1246 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mit Elizabeth mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Monington è nato il circa 1246 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Elizabeth.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Moningtonは約1246年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。彼はElizabethとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Monington(은)는 대략 1246년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 Elizabeth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Monington nasceu aproximadamente 1246, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Elizabeth.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Monington родился около 1246 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Elizabeth.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Monington nació aproximadamente 1246, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Elizabeth.
